message:
fix(conformance): update fixture inventory to include 20 new fixtures

The e2e_scenario_matrix_oracle_contract_v1.json fixture_inventory was
out of sync with actual fixture files on disk. Added 20 new fixture
references across centrality (8), flow (7), matching (3), readwrite (1),
and shortest-path (1) families. All fixtures now covered by journeys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
